title: Mergeable if statements should be combined
description: Nested if statements with the same condition or mergeable conditions should be combined to reduce code complexity and improve readability. Sequential if statements that could be merged into a single if-else chain also fall under this rule.
recommendation: Combine nested if statements or convert sequential if statements to if-else chains to reduce complexity and improve code readability.

checks.message: Nested if statements should be combined using logical operators to reduce complexity
Sequential if statements should be combined into if-else chain for better readability
